title: Rune-Jit Skill Data
description: JSON Schema for OSRS skill YAML data files in data/skills/. Validate with: python3 -c "import jsonschema, yaml, json; jsonschema.validate(yaml.safe_load(open('data/skills/woodcutting.yaml')), json.load(open('data/schemas/skill-data.schema.json')))"

meta.description: Skill-level metadata consumed by the plugin at startup.

skill.description: OSRS skill enum name (e.g. WOODCUTTING, MINING, FISHING)

ticks_per_attempt.description: Game ticks per action attempt (1 tick = 0.6s)

base_chop_animation.description: Default animation ID for the chopping action (verify from cache)

idle_animation.description: Idle animation ID when action is interrupted

axes.description: All valid tool types for this skill, ordered by tier.

name.description: Constant name for the axe type (e.g. RUNE_AXE)

woodcutting_bonus.description: Axe bonus used in the success rate formula

special_attack.description: Special attack identifier if the axe has one

burns_logs.description: Whether the axe can burn logs (Infernal axe)

quest_required.description: Quest required to obtain or use this axe

trees.description: All tree types keyed by constant name (e.g. YEW, MAGIC).

level_required.description: Woodcutting level required to chop this tree

xp.description: XP awarded per log received (exact wiki value)

log_item_id.description: Item ID of the log dropped (null for trees with no log drop)

drops_log.description: Whether the tree drops a log item (false for Blisterwood)

respawn_ticks.description: Ticks until the tree respawns after being depleted (null = never depletes)

difficulty.description: Tree difficulty constant used in the success rate formula

members.description: Whether this tree requires a members account

chop_animation.description: Override animation ID for this tree type (null = use meta.base_chop_animation)

stump_object_id.description: Object ID of the stump spawned after the tree is felled

quest_required.description: Quest required to chop this tree

wiki.description: OSRS wiki URL for this tree type (required citation)

notes.description: Human-readable notes for edge cases or deviations

base_drop_chance.description: 1-in-N chance of a nest drop per log received

drop_table_ref.description: Path to the nest loot table data file
